public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ritual attendant.
appearance: Ritual garments, symbolic tokens, and carefully maintained devotional detail make the role legible at a glance.
manner: Speaks with ritual calm and practiced reassurance, but watches closely for signs of spiritual or civic disturbance. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a ritual attendant still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ritual attendant in and around Threads of Twilight Market, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Threads of Twilight Market workable through the obligations of ritual attendant while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must ensure that rite remains trustworthy even when civic pressure tries to convert it into mere administration. Around Threads of Twilight Market, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of ritual attendant visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Nora March needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Threads of Twilight Market.
Nora March may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Nora March immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Threads of Twilight Market: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts
